# tfe_admin_smtp_settings

Reads SMTP settings for Terraform Enterprise.

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Read-Only

- `auth` (String) The authentication type. Valid values are 'none', 'plain', and 'login'.
- `enabled` (Boolean) Whether SMTP is enabled.
- `host` (String) The hostname of the SMTP server.
- `id` (String) The ID of the SMTP settings. Always 'smtp'.
- `port` (Number) The port of the SMTP server.
- `sender` (String) The sender email address.
- `username` (String) The username used to authenticate to the SMTP server.
